result: If I could change the world in one way, I would ensure that empathy—in the truest sense of understanding and caring for one another—was woven deeply into every person’s perception. So that, instinctively, people felt the needs and suffering of others as their own, and acted with compassion and respect, across all differences. I think that would transform many of the world’s challenges at their roots.

message.content: If I could change the world in one way, I would ensure that empathy—in the truest sense of understanding and caring for one another—was woven deeply into every person’s perception. prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
